# ZapSight US

> AI-powered retail intelligence for furniture retailers. Shop Pilot is our flagship product — an AI sales assistant that lives on retailers' websites and turns static catalogs into guided shopping experiences.

## Company

ZapSight helps furniture retailers sell more with AI. Our primary product, Shop Pilot, is an AI sales assistant that engages website visitors, asks clarifying questions, recommends products, educates shoppers, and drives conversions — all within the retailer's own site.

Key stats:
- 67% of shoppers trust a retailer's own AI over third-party tools
- Shop Pilot handles the full customer journey: greeting → discovery → education → recommendation → checkout
- Remembers returning customers and gets smarter over time
- Integrates with existing ERP, POS, and ecommerce platforms

Secondary capabilities include AI-powered data warehousing, executive dashboards, RSA performance tracking, delivery alerts, and natural-language business intelligence.

## Pages

- [Home](https://zapsight.us): Main landing page for Shop Pilot, ZapSight's AI shopping assistant for furniture retailers
- [Shop Pilot](https://zapsight.us/shop-pilot): Product page for ZapSight's guided AI shopping assistant and conversion layer
- [AI Shopping Experience Audit](https://zapsight.us/audit): Free assessment of a retailer's product discovery path, catalog friction, and Shop Pilot fit
- [Blog](https://zapsight.us/blog): Articles on AI in furniture retail, conversion optimization, digital transformation
